name: Isekai - Anime Fight Club Simulator (Early Access)

reviews.review_description:
The game looks very promising for an anime-style vr game
For the price you get what you get but it demands an update to everything
The grabbing needs to be fix, the whole game needs to be expanded, powers from different anime need to be added and the ui needs an overhaul
Not to mention the awful vignette that surrounds the screen whenever you walk
The dev(s) for this need to fix it and overhaul the whole thing

The left thumbstick won't move my character (smooth, teleport, or turning). I had to switch movement to the right thumbstick and physically turn. I had a huge smile when I got the "ki blast", very nice! After the gym boss, I opened the courtyard gate, a van pulled up, the screen fades to black and respawns me in the courtyard having to do the boss again for the ki blast. Is that all there is so far, or is it glitching?

reviews.review_title: The game is fun but I thought developmen
reviews.review_description: Had this game for a while and it still says early access there are no updates and grabbing stuff is kinda buggy and glitchy. Like the game it has potential but it is definitely noticeable it is not even close to being finished.

reviews.review_title: Great game has great potential I think
reviews.review_description: I don’t know if the game has more updates coming but I definitely like playing it I check up on it once a week hoping for something new but I hope the game finishes quickly I love the game

I quite like what the game is trying to do, at the moment it's VERY early access and I'm not sure how much the developer will be improving combat system how much variety he will propose in term of enemy and gameplay.
I hope this game can provide more physical interaction with enemy, allow player to grab / throw the enemies, bash them against surface ect...
Am also worried by the fact that this developer seem to have a few early access project at the same time.
Anyway this was worth the 200yen I paid to access the demo!
It is a really fun game. You should really get it if you’re like anime it’s an app for you.

leaving a good review to help promote.  the game is fun, just way too short for now.  need more variety of characters also.  all the flights are easy until the boss, but that was a really fun fight.  English subtitles would help.  and the gym code was too hard without clues, just lucky someone else asked here and Dev gave the answer lol.
I like this game because u can beat up anime students which is fun but for the gym how do u find a code for the gym that's the hard part but overall this game is good so ya

developer_response.body:
The Gym code is on the PC room, you need to grab a drive in a table and put on the "teacher's" computer.
Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: it has been here for a while and nothing new

developer_response.body:
Hi Luke,
I know our updates haven't been coming, mostly because we understood that a Big change need to be done for the game to actually move forward.
Our plans are to update it to Unreal 5 and move from a more traditional beat'em up to a more roleplay simulator, but that has been harder than we expected and, giving our lack of funding, it is taking also longer than we wished.
Thanks for the review, please join our Discord so you can share more suggestions.

reviews.review_title: Best anime fight game I've played
reviews.review_description: Basically,I love this game,but it needs more maps and more Charecters and can you please fix the walking thing,because for me i just get stuck when I push my joy stick forward fully,and my controller is okay on other games,and please add more weapons

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review Mark, we plan to have a new version that should have more Sandboxing and less of the beat'em up.

reviews.review_description: I’ve several mobile games that are very similar.  They are not that polished either but by comparison, this one feels very much unfinished with several bugs.  When picking the arm visuals option, you see two pairs of hands simultaneously.  This is clunky, distracting, problematic, and constantly makes it hard to move hands right.  The paths to get to new areas are also lackluster.  Even if I watch the hint video successfully, you aren’t guaranteed success.  For example, the first area, the id card can shoot out and potentially disappear completely.  I was lucky enough to find it.  The second one, I was looking for the figure that appeared but it wasn’t in the area at all.  Though being able to arms is an improvement over most games, it’s still weird to see floating arms or only hands which feels like a throw back to standard fps games from non vr devices.  If you look down, you don’t see your body either.  In some ways, it is worse than those older games because the disembodied hands don’t appear to float around your face and therefore actually look more realistic and three dimensional.  Another slight issue I have, is the hands look large and more like those belonging to middle aged body builder than an anime high school student.  This game clearly needs more work.  Most objects used as weapons tend to fall apart just picking them up.  Most can’t be thrown well and often get hit or destroyed just trying to carry them around to use on opponents.  You can’t see your stats or customize your character as far as I can tell.  The description vaguely implies more than just melee combat or using weapons but I’ve not seen evidence of this yet.  It’s too easy to get stuck in places.  There is no dialogue or sense or plot, story, mission, or even campaign.  It’s like a barely there sense of a form resembling any of those types of games one might expect.  It’s got potential sure, but still ways to go.

developer_response.body:
Oh yeah, thanks for the review. It is in fact a early access game which means it is still in development.
For that specific reason there are so many things that are unfinished.

reviews.review_description: Payed 1$ for early acces and it's better than some games I payed 30$ for full acces and we will leave it at that I hope project dosen t get abandoned

A simple premise, you beat up anime classmates. It's surprisingly fun and well worth the cheap price! 

l hope it gets more updates soon

Its awsome love the style and combat
Wish i could run tho

It's a great concept and an interesting game.

I just have one personal request: the field of view is narrowed to prevent motion sickness while moving, but I'd like to be able to turn this option on and off. I don't get sick in VR, so I'd like to be able to turn off the option to narrow the field of view.

reviews.review_title: Early access=hit but you don't move well
reviews.review_description:
-The game is in early access
-it's cheap
-Colorful setting 
-Various objects that you can use.
-Problem: the jostick to move the character fails randomly. In others it also does not allow the camera of the other jostick to rotate. 
I have decided to leave it and wait to see if we fix this in new updates. 
For the sake of the whole and because I trust that dev will fix it, for now I leave it in the middle of stars.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing it! WE will look into your feedback and try to fix everything!

reviews.review_title: Did I just Isekai'd into an Isekai?
reviews.review_description: It was so satisfying to kick someone's butt in a certain gym... I'm still re-playing to find different ways to pwn them 😂

reviews.review_title: Fun and with a bunch of cool references
reviews.review_description: Very interesting! just finished the first fight and I'm very excited on going through it all

reviews.review_title: Can’t wait to see where this goes. You’r
reviews.review_description: The concept is a good The gameplay is fun  definitely worth it but I feel like it just needs a little bit more. It would be cool if you added kicking and maybe even black flash, but overall pretty good game it’s cheap easy and fun ￼ can’t wait to see more levels ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! We hope we can achieve our milestone to be able to deliver the City map! Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: When I tried to go upstairs it glitched me and I couldn't get out,also I really like the fighting, it was really fun to do combos on them

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review Xavier, your should go downstairs instead of upstairs, we will check this glitching ;)
